UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile with configuration for their custom business website

userId.description: Firebase Authentication UID of the user

bizType.description: Type of category of their business (e.g., F&B, Fashion, UMKM)

websiteTitle.description: The title of the user's business website

themeColor.description: Selected visual accent color for their website

UserFavorite.title: UserFavorite
UserFavorite.description: A template favorited by a user

userId.description: Firebase UID of the user who favorited

templateId.description: The unique identifier of the design template

DomainRequest.title: DomainRequest
DomainRequest.description: A domain search/request submitted by a user

domainName.description: The domain name searched or requested

AppConfig.title: AppConfig
AppConfig.description: Application configurations such as featured templates list selected by admins

templateIds.description: List of selected template IDs for Template Pilihan

updatedBy.description: User email who updated the config

CustomTemplate.title: CustomTemplate
CustomTemplate.description: Template added dynamically by admin users

id.description: Unique identifier of the custom template

image.description: Base64 data url or standard image URL of the template graphic

/user_profiles/{userId}.description: Stores profile settings for each individual user.

/user_favorites/{favoriteId}.description: Stores templates marked as favorites by users.

/domain_requests/{requestId}.description: Stores user searches and requests for custom domains.

/app_config/{configId}.description: Stores global app configurations including list of manually selected featured templates.

/custom_templates/{templateId}.description: Stores user-added templates by the admin user.
